review_title: Very satisfied with a high quality product
author: Mikael Bang K.
pros: Very high compatibility with other products, easy customization and quick and efficient support.
cons: Really haven't stumbled upon any issues.

review_title: That one app you will need for a responsive web design
description: To sum up, Mobiscroll provides us with a fully developing kit set, which is both easier to implement and user-friendly. Also, the part that excites the clients the most is that because of various theme builders and perfectly fitting pre-configured styles, customizations are done by little to zero work, which is fun and saves tons of time. To make the experience more fulfilling, we decided to purchase the full paid version of the software that includes all times of frameworks and UI tools. When analyzing the results and reviewing the demo app, we came to the conclusion that using Mobiscroll is efficient both time-wise and financially. Finally, using Mobiscroll in the long term will give us the best possible development experience, creating a win-win situation for both the company and the clients.
author: Arthur V.
pros: The app is highly recommended because first of all its super easy to use, it’s easy to implement into existing projects. It’s time and money efficient. Also, customizations are done effortlessly. While using the app I faced a small technical issue, but it has been resolved immediately by the help of a super responsive support team. I am very impressed and I don’t regret buying the full version after using the free trial.
cons: so far have not found any disturbing negative sides of this app
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Their tech support doesn't help you, and they don't listen to their customers.
description: It moderately solved speeding up the numerical data entry in my application, and only for a while because they do not provide updates of its components.
author: Alejandro Javier V.
pros: It seemed that his Numpad was just what I needed in my development, it looked complete and functional, until I made the payment for the license, I discovered that it was not.
cons: I found many limitations in its components, more than anything in the Numpad, I told their support team what I needed to do and gave them options: - I offered to pay them extra for the customization of the component, - or that they allow me and my team to extend their component with more characteristics and share the characteristics with them so that they would be part of their components. I received a resounding NO to everything from their "tech support". And even worse, they start with the updates of some components and I ask support to please update the Numpad, a component that I use in my developments, and I again receive a NOT IN OUR PLANS TO UPDATE THE NUMPAD.

review_title: Exactly what I needed
description: I was in the design/architecture phase of a large PWA for a client about a year ago. I'd already laid out all the components and written the markup for most of the pages using MVC and jQuery when I came across mobiscroll. It was such a perfect fit for what I was trying to do that I decided to use mobiscroll instead, and I'm very happy with the result.
author: Saeid I.
pros: In a marketplace for 3rd party components where there's ample options for a developer, one can afford to be choosy. Is it easy to install and setup? Does is have clear documentation and examples? Does is work right off the bat or needs some figuring out and work-arounds? Mobiscroll's components just work. No tedious installation or setup process. And they look and behave exactly as you expect, especially on mobile devices. I've been using most of its components in a PWA in React. And on a mobile device, you can not tell that it's not a native app. The pre-configured themes, as well as their theme builder allows you to further enhance the look and feel of your app to fit your design perfectly.
cons: I don't have anything negative to say about this software. But I have a few suggestions for enhancements. Pass HTML attributes such as class names, ID, data attributes, etc. directly to the DOM. Return the standard event object. Make it easier to find the answer in docs. It would be great if the description and/or the examples in the 'demo' pages link directly to their section in docs.

review_title: Incredibly versatile and amazing support
description: Mobiscroll saves us hundreds of hours a month, no question. Best money we've spent on licensing.
author: Chris G.
pros: We have used Mobiscroll for a number of development projects withing our company for the past 5 years. They keep adding more and more components that make it easy for us to delivery great responsive experiences across a number of devices. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and his team are amazing. Any time we have an issue or are trying to figure out how to make a component do something a little different, they're right there, often times sending us back a custom code sample to get us going in the right direction. And it's always nice to see something we've hacked on get incorporated into the next release.
cons: If there's one thing, it can be the little inconsistencies between the components. Sometimes there's a property that will accept one format on one component, but not on another. Or a method might go by a slightly different name. The documentation is very good in this regard though.

review_title: RMS - Property management and booking systems
description: Great. Being a booking site we use calendar range pickers and time pickers frequently. It has save countless hours of dev and device testing if we used individual open source libraries instead
author: Vadim O.
pros: Feature rich and fairly customisable. With date and time range pickers being what we utilise the most, It was easy to implement and to customise. We created an availability calendar using the range picker displaying rates and availability info in the day cell. It saved us a lot of time developing one from scratch
cons: Although mobiscroll was initially designed to make mobile/touch more intuitive I feel it lacks the desktop/mouse crossover with some of the controls. We did intially go with mobiscroll for the mobile experience but we have a desktop version of the site as well that we like to keep consistant in look feel and experience. I have notice some improvements in this area with new versions.

review_title: The missing link
description: Excellent library and excellent support. All questions are answered within a short time
author: Christoph L.
pros: Well demos and documentation is done in a really good way so for almost any case there is a demo available. Events can be used to listen to almost everything that happens to the components. Date selectors and calendars are just the thing i was looking for and it helps me to focus on crucial things instead of fixing or building date pickers. Could not find another product that was working this nice. I use a lot of the lists views with slide actions they are easy to customize. Will keep using more and more of this fantastic library. Updates are rolling in on a regular basis, the tool gets better and better every month. Im working on ionic.
cons: Well the only pitfall is that the package size grows a lot but im pretty sure the mobiscroll team is working on that already.

review_title: A very good product made by a great team!
description: We saved a lot of money and we added a lot of value to our product in terms of user experience.
author: Benoit S.
pros: Mobiscroll provides many highly-customizable and high-quality controls. They guarantee a very good user experience which is similar to the one we have using native components thanks to their ability to adapt their theme to the device. Integrating Mobiscroll saved us a lot of time and added some value to our application. The support team is very skilled and reactive. We had complex requirements and they helped us to find a solution to implement all of them. They also quickly fixed several bugs or errors in the documentation we reported, even if they are specific and hard to reproduce.
cons: We integrated Mobiscroll in a ionic application and we ran into some little conflicts due to ionic specificities. The support team helped us to solve all of these conflicts and the result is very satisfying. The Mobiscroll angular binding works fine but does not always follow the angular data-binding principle. For instance if you change the configuration of a control, you have to call a function for the change to be taken into account.

review_title: A very good solution for the development of a PWA application
description: I am developing a progressive we app, and I need it to work on multi-device (mobile, desktop) and multi-OS (ios, mac os, windows, android) I save a lot of time on the front development and I have all the tools to have a mobile first approach.
author: Julien M.
pros: - identical operation on the different OS - simple to have a mobile first approach in development
cons: I find all the features I need for my développement.

review_title: My experience with mobiscroll
description: I used Mobiscroll for ionic apps, because they had a beautiful calendar component, but that's all. We decided to use custom elements made by our team.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It connects easily with any existing project Good documentation on their website Nice support team
cons: The price is quite high for what it delivers, but this depends on your needs

review_title: Amazing Group to work with
description: They have addresses everything I requested in a very timely manner. Over all I have no complaints
author: Jeff J.
pros: Very responsive team. Open minded to listening to new ideas. They continue to improve and extend the product

review_title: Great versatile software suite which is easy to implement throughout my web apps
author: Paul H.
pros: The whole Mobiscroll suite is a great plugin to use throughout my development process. It's easy to integrate the many different options to give mobile and touch users a much more controlled and seamless experience. The theming system is also great and really flexible.
cons: Not much really! I really would like a sass version of the generated theme. License costs are a bit expensive, especially for 1 component.

review_title: works well
description: Great support and works better than other tools I tried
author: donald D.
pros: Does what it says it does, the features are well implemented.
cons: I can't think of anything at this time, it is doing what I need.

review_title: Very well done. Saved me a lot of time and effort to get a great looking UI that is clean and fast.
description: Improved UI/UX for my Ionic 3 application.
author: Tim R.
pros: Easy to implement and work with. Right out of the box it accomplished the majority of functionality I needed.
cons: Hard to get real time support and I was using the beta so the documentation was not quite all current yet. All good though still worth it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Optimize your UI development
description: Optimized delivery of solutions and reduced development effort.
author: Michael H.
pros: Easy to use API and well documented. The date and time pickers saved us a ton of time in development and testing. Our clients also loved the look and feel.

review_title: Good UI results but kind of a bit difficult to implement some of the modules.
description: It fulfilled the requirements that our client set up in our application.
author: Sergio C.
pros: Overall good impressions with the UI, the end user experience is really nice. The icon/image supported modules are great.
cons: Some modules are hard to implement compared to others, some of them a bit obnoxious. Customer service takes a few days to answer, that may be too much when developing a product.

review_title: MobiScroll make my apps working better and look like a good mobile app.
description: Research over the internet.
author: Henrique C.
pros: The UI interfaces and scroll options are amazing. Also I like to use the selected menu, I feel you should make more improvements in forms and the list view options.
cons: Sometimes the Skins are confusing for me, list view sometimes it's not enough to build option forms.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Solid, Flexible, Extensible
description: Excellent. These guys are very professional, very prompt and generally address requests quickly.
author: John L.
pros: The Mobiscroll UI components are amongst the best I have used. They have incredible customization, and can be tailored to whatever application or platform (mobile, web, desktop) you are using. The team has been giving us constant updates over the years, and migration to new versions has mostly been very easy. They are always pursuing new integrations with the latest popular frameworks (Angular, React and even Ionic), and we love that it is just Javascript (and css) at its core.
cons: Sometimes the options can be a little confusing, but the team is very responsive to help provide guidance on how to use a particular component. We have also had to workaround a few things where we could not wire up custom callbacks of our own because the underlying component did not send the custom attributes we tried to use.

review_title: Amazing piece of software, i love the simplicity of the UI and my customers love it too.
description: It has made the process of user input for date, time, and others really simple and intuitive. Users love to interact with this UI and they are more likely to give the input on this. Also with so many customization options on how it can be customized for picking specific set of dates and time make the process of selection even more easy.
author: Vinit A.
pros: It is very easy to set it up, and the customization options are plenty. One of the most important feature is that it has some really sensible default values, so that you don't HAVE to customize everything at the beginning and you can dig deeper into customization as you go along.
cons: I think some customization related to styling of the UI would be more helpful. Right now i can choose from the given set of themes, which is great, but a bit more control on styling would be amazing. Probably these are already there, and i have not yet figured out how to change it.

review_title: Easy installation and integration with jquery
author: Raymond D.
pros: Easy to drop in, jQuery compliant, made customization easy. Worked pretty well in our desktop as well as mobile environments, allowing a continuity of experience. Some of our best-looking parts are Mobiscroll components!
cons: Restricted to HTML5! Wish it were React Native. That's where we are headed in the near future. As an aside, the documentation is not always awesome about clarifying what events do, and what information comes with them. Tinkering wasn't so bad, and the events themselves are powerful, but reading was not sufficient to answer questions.

review_title: Great support
description: Great!
author: Nicklas R.
pros: We have a quite advance use case using the date range component and it took some time to set it up to do what we wanted. During this time Mobiscroll's support was excellent every step of the way! The result was that are use-case is working flawlessly which we weren't able to achieve with other solutions we tried or evaulated.
cons: We had some minor bugs in the beginning that throw us off, making us wonder if the react support wasn't working.

review_title: Responsiveness
description: I want to make the site have a uniform look on both big screens and small screens. This is the reason I switched to your software.
author: Tommy T.
pros: Very easy to use and Ready to implement.
cons: There is one thing you should do is to make your software responsive so they will be compatible with all devices. Must off features you have will look good on mobiles but not On big screens.

review_title: Awesome service! Great product, really helped our business solve a problem!
description: It helped improve the user experience of our product by offering a consistent feature widget across all devices and browsers.
author: Daniel M.
pros: It's easy and extremely flexible. We needed to fix the inconstancies between our jQuery calendar widget and native functionality of mobile devices. Once we started using Mobiscroll, our conversions have improved and the experience much more delightful!
cons: Initially, I didn't understand how easy it was to implement. After a few chats to support, it was super easy and we had it up and running within just a few days <3

review_title: Amazing tool for easy and fast development
author: Mariano B.
pros: Mobiscroll became a key tool in my development process, not only allowing me to write code faster, but adding amazing features and functions. The clear documentation and a the “demo” site are really helpful
cons: I have no complaints at all. It’s just great for me

review_title: I love this product but it seems rather expensive for something anyone can take from my website
author: Gary J.
pros: The fact that it works vocistintly across browsers and is relatively easy to setup, use and troubkeshoot
cons: I would like to see cheaper features everyone who visits my site basically has everything I paid for for their own use in there temporary internet files folder
